name: Sofia Ramírez
text: CriterIA cut our contract review time by 70%. What used to take my team three days now takes a few hours. The risk-scoring feature alone has saved us from signing two unfavorable agreements this quarter.

name: Marcus Chen
text: As a startup, we couldn't afford a full-time legal team. CriterIA gave us enterprise-grade compliance monitoring at a fraction of the cost. The regulatory alerts have been a game-changer for our expansion plans.

name: Amara Diallo
text: The document automation module alone paid for itself within the first month. We went from struggling with manual NDA workflows to generating 200+ customized agreements per week with zero errors.

name: James Okafor
text: We were skeptical about AI in legal practice, but CriterIA proved us wrong. The litigation analytics helped us win a case by revealing a judge's granting patterns we had completely overlooked.
